message:
feat(core): integrate fleet memory telemetry into unified telemetry schema

Add FleetMemory variant to SubsystemLayer and SubsystemPayload enums,
wrapping FleetMemorySnapshot (controller state) and CoordinatorTelemetry
(eviction stats). This makes fleet scrollback pressure data visible in
the unified telemetry envelope alongside policy, storage, and runtime
snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
